settings.guideBody:
1️⃣  Scan ingredients
Snap a photo of the ingredients in your fridge or shopping basket.

2️⃣  Generate AI recipes
AI recognizes your ingredients and recommends tailored recipes.

3️⃣  Check nutrition info
View the calories, protein, carbs, and fat for each recipe.

4️⃣  Save recipes
Save the recipes you like with the ♥ button.

5️⃣  Ask the quokka
Ask the quokka anything — ingredient swaps, calorie adjustments, and more.

6️⃣  Buy missing ingredients
Order any ingredients you don't have at home right from Coupang.
settings.updateBody:
🎉  v1.0.0 — First Release

• AI ingredient recognition
• 3 tailored recipe recommendations
• Nutrition info (calories · protein · carbs · fat)
• Recipe saving & bookmarks
• Ask the quokka
• Coupang integration for missing ingredients
• YouTube recipe video search
• Dietary preference settings (allergies · spice level · diet, etc.)
settings.termsBody:
Quokka Recipe Terms of Service

By installing, downloading, or using the App, you agree to these Terms and the Privacy Policy.

Article 1 (Purpose)
These Terms govern the rights, obligations, and responsibilities between ChaSoft ("the Company") and users regarding the use of the Quokka Recipe app and related services ("the Service").

Article 2 (Definitions)
1. "Service" means AI-powered recipe recommendations and related features.
2. "User" means anyone who uses the Service under these Terms.
3. "Leaves" means the in-service currency used to call AI features, divided into free leaves and paid (purchased/bonus) leaves.
4. "Quokka Pass" means a paid subscription that auto-renews monthly.
5. "Account" means the identity a user optionally links via Google sign-in; the Service can be used without signing in.

Article 3 (Effect and Amendment of Terms)
1. These Terms take effect when posted within the Service.
2. The Company may amend these Terms within the bounds of applicable law, giving notice at least 7 days before the effective date (30 days for changes unfavorable to users).
3. Continued use after an amendment takes effect is deemed acceptance.

Article 4 (Provision and Change of Service)
1. The Company provides:
· AI-based recipe recommendations (photo recognition, manual entry, dish-name search)
· Ingredient entry via receipt recognition
· Fridge ingredient management
· Recipe saving, folders, notes, Q&A, cooking diary
· YouTube recipe video search
· Optional sign-in (account linking) to keep leaf balance
2. The Company aims for uninterrupted service but may suspend it temporarily for maintenance, external API outages, etc.
3. The Company may change or discontinue the Service for operational/technical reasons, giving prior notice if paid services are materially affected.

Article 5 (Paid Services and Payment)
1. Paid services consist of "leaf packs" (one-time) and "Quokka Pass" (subscription).
2. All payments are processed through Google Play or the Apple App Store; amounts, currency, and taxes follow each store's display.
3. Paid leaves are credited immediately upon payment; purchased/bonus leaves are kept without an expiry date (except upon service termination).
4. With a Quokka Pass subscription, a set amount of leaves is granted each billing cycle and no ads are shown.

Article 6 (Subscription and Cancellation)
1. Quokka Pass auto-renews each billing cycle after purchase.
2. Users may cancel anytime in each store's subscription management, at least 24 hours before the next billing date.
3. Upon cancellation, service continues until the end of the paid period, after which auto-renewal stops.
4. Deleting the app does not cancel the subscription; cancellation must be done in each store's subscription management.

Article 7 (Withdrawal and Refund)
1. Refunds follow the refund policy and procedures of Google Play or the Apple App Store where payment was made.
2. Under the Act on Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce, unused paid leaves may be withdrawn within 7 days of payment.
3. However, withdrawal may be restricted for digital content already used or immediately consumed, and the Company discloses this before purchase.
4. If a minor pays without a legal guardian's consent, the minor or guardian may cancel the payment.

Article 8 (Use of Leaves)
1. Free leaves reset to a set amount daily at midnight (KST) and do not carry over.
2. Paid/bonus leaves are non-refundable in cash (except through refund procedures) and non-transferable.
3. Leaf balances are managed on the Company's server for abuse prevention; users must not tamper with balances.

Article 9 (Account and Data Storage/Loss)
1. The Service can be used without signing in; in that case the leaf balance is linked to the user's device identifier and stored on the Company's server. The balance may persist across reinstalls on the same device, but may be unrecoverable if the device identifier changes (device reset, device change, etc.).
2. If a user links an account via Google sign-in, the leaf balance is tied to the account and can be carried over when signing in or reinstalling on another device.
3. Other data such as saved recipes, folders, notes, fridge ingredients, settings, and cooking diary are stored only on the user's device and may be deleted or lost due to device change, app deletion, OS change, or device failure, and may be unrecoverable.
4. The Company is not liable for such data loss absent intent or gross negligence. Please keep any needed information separately.

Article 10 (Ads)
1. The Company may show ads to free users.
2. Watching a rewarded ad grants leaves; daily counts and intervals are limited to prevent abuse.
3. No ads are shown to Quokka Pass users.

Article 11 (User Obligations)
Users must not:
1. Obtain ad rewards/leaves by abnormal means or tamper with balances
2. Reverse-engineer or improperly access the Service
3. Copy or distribute Service content without authorization
4. Steal or impersonate another's account
5. Violate applicable law or these Terms

Article 12 (Disclaimer)
1. Recipes and information from the Service are reference material generated by generative AI; the Company does not guarantee their accuracy, completeness, timeliness, or suitability.
2. Users must check ingredient freshness, expiry, allergens, and cooking safety before cooking.
3. The Company is not liable for cooking results or food-safety issues arising from use, absent intent or gross negligence.
4. The Company is not liable for damages beyond its reasonable control, such as force majeure or external API/platform outages.

Article 13 (Intellectual Property)
Intellectual property rights, including copyright, in the Service and related content belong to the Company.

Article 14 (Restriction and Termination)
If a user violates these Terms, the Company may, after prior notice (or subsequent notice in urgent cases), restrict use or terminate the agreement. Users may terminate anytime by signing out and deleting data, or by requesting account deletion.

Article 15 (Dispute Resolution and Governing Law)
1. These Terms are interpreted under the laws of the Republic of Korea.
2. Disputes follow the Electronic Commerce Act and related laws and consumer dispute resolution standards.

Article 16 (Inquiries)
For service inquiries, contact us via "Send feedback" in the app or email (chasoft.official@gmail.com).

Addendum
These Terms take effect on July 19, 2026.
settings.privacyBody:
Last updated: 2026.07.19

Quokka Recipe ("the App") values your privacy and complies with applicable laws including the Personal Information Protection Act. This policy explains what information the App collects, uses, and shares, and how it is handled.

The App can be used as a guest without signing in. Optional Google sign-in is offered only if you want to keep your leaf balance across device changes or reinstalls.

1. Information We Collect

1.1 Information you provide directly
· Ingredient photos (camera or photo library)
· Receipt photos (when used)
· Ingredient names you type
· Dietary preferences (allergies, spice level, cooking time, diet type, cooking skill, preferred cuisine)
· Notes and questions about recipes
· Cooking-diary photos you take
· (Optional) When you sign in with Google: your Google account email, profile (name, picture), and account identifier

1.2 Information collected automatically
· Device identifier (links a guest's leaf balance to the device)
· App usage statistics (type/count/time of AI calls, scan counts, etc.)
· Leaf balance and usage (spend/credit) history
· Saved recipe info (when you save with the ♥ button)
· (When ads are shown) advertising identifier and ad-related info (see 3.6)

1.3 Information we do NOT collect
· Passwords (only Google sign-in is supported; we never store passwords)
· Location
· Contacts, call logs, or other apps' data on your device

2. Where Information Is Stored

2.1 On-device storage
· Dietary preferences
· Saved recipes, folders, notes
· Quokka Q&A history
· Fridge ingredient list
· Cooking diary (photos you take)
Stored only in your device's secure storage (iOS Keychain, Android KeyStore) and not sent to or stored on the company's (ChaSoft) servers.

2.2 Server storage (Supabase)
For reliable leaf management and abuse prevention, the following is stored on our cloud server (Supabase):
· Leaf balance and usage (spend/credit) history
· AI usage statistics (type/count/time)
· Device identifier or (when signed in) Google account info (email, etc.)
This is keyed by your device identifier or Google account ID so your leaf balance persists across reinstalls or sign-in on another device.

3. Sharing With External Services

The App uses the following external services to provide core features.

3.1 Google Gemini API (AI)
· Data sent: ingredient/receipt images, ingredient text, dietary preferences, recipe info, your questions
· Purpose: ingredient recognition, recipe generation, recipe Q&A, YouTube caption/description analysis
· Method: sent to Google via our server (Supabase); we do not store the request content on our server
· Provider: Google LLC (USA)
· Privacy policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy

3.2 Supabase (server infrastructure)
· Data stored/processed: leaf balance/history, app usage statistics, device identifier, (when signed in) account info
· Purpose: leaf wallet management, user authentication (sign-in), AI request relay
· Provider: Supabase, Inc. (USA)
· Privacy policy: https://supabase.com/privacy

3.3 Google Sign-In (optional)
· Data collected: Google account email, profile (name, picture), account identifier
· Purpose: optional sign-in to keep leaf balance across device changes/reinstalls
· Provider: Google LLC (USA)
· Privacy policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy

3.4 RevenueCat (in-app purchases)
· Data sent: purchase/subscription history, user identifier (device identifier or account ID)
· Purpose: managing and validating in-app purchases and subscriptions
· Provider: RevenueCat, Inc. (USA)
· Privacy policy: https://www.revenuecat.com/privacy

3.5 Google YouTube Data API
· Data sent: search terms based on ingredient names
· Purpose: recipe video search
· Provider: Google LLC (USA)
· Privacy policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy

3.6 Google AdMob (ads)
· Data used: advertising identifier, device info, ad impressions/clicks and related info
· Purpose: banner and rewarded ads for free users
· Provider: Google LLC (USA)
· Privacy policy: https://policies.google.com/technologies/ads
· No ads are shown to Quokka Pass (subscription) users.

3.7 Coupang Partners
· Data sent: ingredient name (only when you tap a "Buy on Coupang" link)
· Purpose: linking to ingredient purchase page
· Provider: Coupang Corp.
· Privacy policy: https://www.coupang.com/np/privacy

The App does not share your information with any third parties other than those listed above.

4. Permissions

The App uses the following permissions and does not use them for any other purpose without your explicit consent.
· Camera: taking ingredient and receipt photos — optional (gallery available if denied)
· Photo library: selecting ingredient photos from gallery — optional (camera available if denied)
You can change permissions anytime in device settings.

5. Retention and Deletion

5.1 On-device data
· Retention: until you delete the app or use "Delete all data" in the app
· Deletion: removed immediately upon app deletion or reset

5.2 Server data (Supabase)
· Retention: kept for leaf management and abuse prevention; deleted without delay upon account deletion request
· Account/data deletion: delete your account and server data instantly via "My → Profile → Delete account" in the app; if you can't access the app, email chasoft.official@gmail.com.

5.3 Data sent to external services
Governed by each external service's privacy policy.

6. Your Rights

· Access: view stored info in the app's "Fridge", "Saved recipes", "My" menus
· Correction: edit directly in the relevant menu
· Deletion: delete individual data or use "Delete all data" for bulk deletion
· Sign in/out: sign in or out with Google in the "My" menu
· Account deletion: delete instantly via "My → Profile → Delete account" in the app (or request via the contact above)
· App removal: deleting the app removes all locally stored data

7. Children Under 14

The App does not intentionally collect personal information from children under 14. Children under 14 must use the App with the consent of a legal guardian.

8. Security

· On-device data is stored in OS secure storage (iOS Keychain, Android KeyStore)
· Server (Supabase) data is protected by access control (row-level security); the app cannot access server data directly and only through verified server functions
· Communication with external services uses HTTPS encryption
· Sign-in uses Google OAuth; the App never stores passwords
· The company does not separately store the ingredient images or inputs relayed for AI features

9. Changes

This policy may be revised due to legal or service changes. Changes are announced on this page, and significant changes are notified in-app. The last-updated date appears at the top of this document.

10. Contact

For questions about this policy or data handling:
· Company: ChaSoft
· Email: chasoft.official@gmail.com

The App is a solo-developed app without a separate data protection officer; we will respond promptly to inquiries at the contact above.
